herb_parts.name: root
herb_parts.desc: Ammi visnaga root is known to have a diuretic effect, helping to increase urine production and relieve symptoms of edema and hypertension. Furthermore, ammi visnaga root has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties.
